summary: This specification defines a standard way to allow controlled NFTs' metadata updates along predefined formulas. Updates of the original metadata are restricted and defined by a set of recipes and the sequence and results of these recipes are deterministic and fully verifiable with on-chain metadata updates event. The proposal depends on and extends the [EIP-721](./eip-721.md) and [EIP-1155](./eip-1155.md).
title: NFT Updatable Metadata Extension
